name: otf-ui-native-storybook-preview
description: Static landing page that shows the @otfdashkit/ui-native storybook running inside a phone frame, with an Expo Go QR for native preview.

scripts.deploy: bash -c 'set -a && [ -f .env ] && source .env && set +a; npx wrangler pages deploy . --project-name otf-ui-native-storybook-preview --commit-dirty=true --branch=main'
